labels.comment: Spin-wait loop checking version field for node unlinking/shrinking completion - high contention atomic polling
Optimistic read loop with version validation - atomic version checks during tree traversal
Update retry loop with version-based optimistic concurrency control
Rebalancing loop with per-node lock acquisition for AVL tree maintenance

Recursive tree traversal following child pointers - random access pattern

Key comparison branches during tree traversal - unpredictable branching based on key distribution
Multiple condition checks for node state (unlink required, rebalance required) - complex branching
